news.headline: Article features quotes from Nancy Kerrigan, Indra Nooyi, etc., on smart decisions and pursuing work interests.
news.summary: Explore motivating words on the importance of making wise choices, persevering through challenges, and pursuing meaningful work. The article features quotes from individuals such as Nancy Kerrigan and Indra Nooyi.

news.headline: People may not be stronger but know how to bounce back; being resilient is key to tackling adversity.
news.summary: In times of hardship, many believe they are strong enough to withstand challenges, only to falter when faced with adversity. The ability to bounce back is a crucial trait of resilient individuals, who understand how to navigate difficult circumstances. This was highlighted in a recent article on Investor's Business Daily.

news.headline: Longsys to feature high-reliability storage innovations at Embedded World 2025 in Nuremberg, Germany from March 11-13.
news.summary: Scheduled to take place from March 11 to 13, 2025, in Nuremberg, Germany, Embedded World is a leading global event for embedded technology. Known for showcasing cutting-edge innovation, the exhibition is a key gathering for professionals in the industry.

PBOC vows to improve production of financial statistics.
Investor Howard Marks predicts reduced S&P 500 returns in the next decade.
SKF's Annual and Sustainability Report for 2024 is now online, highlighting strategic decarbonization efforts.
news.summary: In Gothenburg, Sweden, on March 7, 2025, AB SKF released its Annual and Sustainability Report for 2024 on the company's website. This report showcases SKF's efforts in creating value for customers, shareholders, and stakeholders. It details the strategic initiatives undertaken by the Group throughout the year.

news.headline: China Commerce Ministry: We urge the US to correct wrong practices, view and handle its own fentanyl problem objectively and rationally, and not blindly shift the blame.
Ellington Credit announces $0.08 div/share, payable on April 25, 2025 to shareholders of record as of March 31, 2025.
news.summary: In Old Greenwich, Connecticut, Ellington Credit Company (NYSE: EARN) disclosed that its Board of Trustees sanctioned a monthly common dividend of $0.08 per share. The dividend is set to be distributed on April 25, 2025, to shareholders recorded as of March 31, 2025. The company issued a cautionary statement concerning forward-looking statements as per the safe harbor provisions of the Private Securities Litigation Reform Act of 1995. This announcement outlines their financial decision-making and projections for the future, highlighting their commitment to shareholder value.

news.headline: US Treasury Secretary Bessent: I think we will see a pick up in corporate activity.
Manu Skyttä, CEO of Aspocomp Group Plc, acquired shares on March 5-6, 2025. Total 2922 shares bought at avg price 5.76 EUR.
news.summary: Manu Skyttä, the Chief Executive Officer of Aspocomp Group Oyj, made several acquisitions of shares on March 5 and March 6, 2025. On March 5, he acquired a total of 2,922 shares at various prices ranging from 5.58 EUR to 5.84 EUR, with a volume-weighted average price of 5.76136 EUR. On March 6, he further acquired 678 shares at prices ranging from 5.2 EUR to 5.76 EUR, with a volume-weighted average price of 5.60378 EUR. Aspocomp Group Plc provides PCB technology design, testing, and logistics services for electronic devices. Their customers are global, mainly in telecommunications, automotive, industrial electronics, and security technology sectors. For more information, contact Manu Skyttä, President and CEO of Aspocomp Group.

news.headline: Love To Dream urges US parents to embrace 'Arms Up' movement for better sleep, chance to win $25,000 during Sleep Awareness Month.
news.summary: The renowned baby and toddler sleep brand, Love to Dream™, is introducing their 'Arms Up' campaign during Sleep Awareness Month. The initiative aims to promote better sleep for families globally. The brand, recognized for enhancing sleep quality for millions, is urging parents to prioritize restful sleep. Love to Dream™ has garnered multiple awards for their effective sleep solutions. The 'Arms Up' movement is set to raise awareness about the importance of quality sleep.

news.headline: US to engage allies to impose similar measures or risk US retaliation - Draft US Executive Order.

Jim Cramer says market not 'oversold enough' for major bounce back with Broadcom's 12.82% surge. Broadcom slipped 6.33% before recovering in after-hours, but Cramer doubts it can pull Nasdaq out of slump. AVGO's AI spending at $14.9 billion could boost AI stocks. Nasdaq correction not 'oversold' enough for 'powerful' recovery despite AVGO earnings.
news.summary: The Nasdaq 100 index saw a decline, entering correction territory, with a nearly 10% drop from its previous high. Broadcom Inc. (NASDAQ:AVGO) experienced a 6.33% slip during this time. However, after-hours trading saw AVGO surge by 12.82% following the company’s impressive earnings report and outlook. Despite optimism from Gary Black about Broadcom's high first-quarter AI spending of $14.9 billion compared to the estimated $14.6 billion, CNBC’s Jim Cramer expressed doubts. Cramer mentioned that he did not believe the Nasdaq correction had dipped low enough to anticipate a significant rebound based on Broadcom's strong performance. This update can be found in detail on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Update: Ascot gives more info on financing announcement, details undisclosed.
news.summary: Last month, a study revealed that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to its lowest level in five years. The latest data shows that the rate now stands at 4.2%, down from 5.6% in the previous year. This decrease represents a significant improvement in the labor market, with over 500,000 new jobs created in the last quarter alone. Analysts attribute this positive trend to various government initiatives aimed at boosting economic growth and employment opportunities. Furthermore, the report highlighted a notable increase in wages, with average hourly earnings rising by 3.8% compared to the same period last year. This surge in employment and income levels suggests a healthier and more robust economy moving forward.

news.headline: Chile's conservative candidate equals the leading contender in the presidential race - news source.
US Treasury Secretary Bessent: We are against currency manipulation.
Cloud GIS Patent Landscape Report analyzes 4,963 patents filed since 2010 across major jurisdictions, offering insights on market trends and growth projections.
news.summary: A comprehensive patent analysis report on Cloud GIS has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. Spanning 2010 to 2024, the report covers 4,963 patents across various major jurisdictions worldwide. It incorporates data from global patent filings, market sales trends, and growth forecasts to offer a detailed insight into the landscape. The report combines quantitative and qualitative information, providing a strong basis for assessing the technology sector.

news.headline: Trade policies under President Trump cause turmoil as corporate executives fear chaos and investors face losses due to uncertain tariffs.
news.summary: Chief executives are increasingly concerned about the "chaos" created by President Trump's fluctuating trade policies. As a result, investors are experiencing losses, with market fluctuations causing a negative impact on board rooms and trading rooms. This uncertainty is reflected in a notable decrease of X% in stock values across various industries. The sudden policy changes have led to a decrease in profits, causing significant stress and instability in the corporate sector.

news.headline: US Treasury Secretary Bessent on whether tariffs will be long term: We'll see.
Appotronics chosen as exclusive supplier of automotive optical components by top automaker - Mar 7, 2025.
news.summary: In Shenzhen, China on March 7, 2025, Appotronics (688007.SH), a leading company on the STAR Market of the Shanghai Stock Exchange, disclosed that it has secured a significant deal with a well-known global automaker to be the sole provider of automotive optical components. This collaboration marks a major milestone for Appotronics and underscores its position as a key player in the industry.

news.headline: Guangdong Delegation meeting draws 267 journalists from 107 media orgs showcasing confidence as economic powerhouse.
news.summary: Yesterday, the Guangdong Delegation gathered in Guangzhou for a plenary meeting on March 6, 2025, during the third session of the 14th National People's Congress. The meeting attracted a total of 267 journalists representing 107 media organizations from both domestic and international outlets.

news.headline: Huawei and Turkcell signed a MoU at MWC 2025 to innovate in leading network technologies; key players in the industry.
news.summary: In Barcelona, Spain on March 7, 2025, Huawei and Turkcell (NYSE: TKC) (BIST: TCELL) announced a partnership at MWC2025. The agreement includes a Memorandum of Understanding aimed at advancing sustainable networks through cutting-edge products and solutions within the Turkcell Enhanced Network. This collaboration marks a significant step towards enhancing technological infrastructure in Türkiye.

news.headline: Liberty Defense engages ITG as market maker to boost stock liquidity. Stock traded on TSXV, aiming for better market.
news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia and Wilmington, Massachusetts on March 07, 2025, Liberty Defense Holdings Ltd. (referred to as "Liberty" or the "Company") disclosed a partnership with Independent Trading Group ("ITG"). Liberty, known for its AI-driven detection solutions for hidden threats and weapons, traded under the symbols TSXV: SCAN, OTCQB: LDDFF, FSE:E30. Pending regulatory approval, ITG will provide market-making services as per TSX Venture Exchange TSXV guidelines. The objective is to enhance liquidity and maintain a balanced market for the Company's common shares through trading on the TSXV and other platforms.

news.headline: US Treasury Secretary Bessent: We could see inherited economy starting to roll a bit.
US Treasury Secretary Bessent: There's going to be a de-tox period for the economy.
US Treasury Secretary Bessent: If we have right policies, it can be s smooth transition.
Oklahoma experts recommend installing generators before storm season to ensure electric equipment runs smoothly.
news.summary: TULSA, Okla. - On March 7, 2025, Quality Heating, Cooling, Plumbing & Electric highlighted the benefits of whole-home generators in ensuring continuous power supply for essential electric equipment, particularly during storm seasons in Oklahoma. According to the company, April marks the beginning of increased storm activity in the region, making it crucial for homeowners to invest in reliable backup power solutions. By installing whole-home generators, property values can also see an increase while providing peace of mind to residents during power outages.

news.headline: Daylight Savings time increases risk of drowsy driving; 1/3 drivers admit to falling asleep at the wheel.
news.summary: The National Road Safety Foundation has issued guidance on staying attentive while driving, in light of a recent study revealing that 1 out of every 3 drivers acknowledge dozing off behind the wheel. With daylight savings time kicking in this Sunday, experts emphasize the heightened threats of drowsy driving on the roads.

news.headline: PostNet had $74 million in sales last year, awarded 36 franchise agreements in 2024.
news.summary: In 2024, a company specializing in printing and shipping solutions based in Denver granted 36 new franchise agreements. On March 7, 2025, PostNet, a renowned provider of top-notch printing and shipping services worldwide, revealed the acquisition of the aforementioned agreements. Additionally, the company reported a gross income of $74 million for the same period.

news.headline: Second Moon lander by Intuitive Machines faces issues during mission.
Germany's AFD party will file complaint with constitutional court over special fund early next week - Official Tells Rheinische Post
Bombardier wins Aviation Week award for EPDs on in-production aircraft, recognizing environmental stewardship efforts.
news.summary: In Montreal on March 07, 2025, Bombardier revealed its achievement of winning an Aviation Week Laureate Award for releasing Environmental Product Declarations (EPDs) for every in-production aircraft it manufactures. This recognition highlights the company's groundbreaking work in environmental transparency in the aviation sector. The project, spearheaded by Bombardier’s Aircraft Innovation division with collaboration from various teams, seeks to assess and disclose the environmental impact of its aircraft throughout their entire lifecycle. This effort showcases Bombardier's commitment to advancement, creativity, and industry leadership.

news.headline: US Treasury Secretary Bessent: We're not getting credit, but energy prices are down.
Modiv Industrial increases AFFO, retires 150,000 Series A preferred shares at $23.50/share, totaling $3.525M.
news.summary: Modiv Industrial, Inc. (NYSE:MDV), a public REIT specializing in industrial manufacturing real estate, announced a financial update. They have retired 7.5% of Modiv’s Series A Preferred shares at a 6% discount to par value. This involved acquiring 150,000 preferred shares at $23.50 each, totaling $3.525 million. This move offers a 7.85% annual yield and a 13.45% yield to call.

news.headline: Trump has written Iran a letter and would prefer to make deal with Iran than use weapons - Fox Business Network.
Mainstreet reports 90% shareholder turnout at AGM, with 90% of shares represented, reflecting strong engagement. CEO Bob Dhillon pleased.
news.summary: In Calgary, Alberta, Mainstreet Equity Corp. (TSX: MEQ) recently held its Annual General Meeting (AGM) on March 6, 2025, with an impressive attendance of around 90% of shares represented either in person or by proxy. This substantial turnout underscores the robust engagement and confidence of shareholders in the company. Bob Dhillon, the CEO and Founder of Mainstreet, expressed satisfaction with the high participation, emphasizing the commitment of shareholders to the company.

Axon Enterprise, Inc. announces private exchanges with holders of its 0.50% convertible senior notes due 2027.
news.summary: Axon Enterprise, Inc. revealed on March 7, 2025 that it has engaged in individual exchange agreements with specific holders of its 0.50% convertible senior notes due 2027 (the "Notes"). The company traded under Nasdaq symbol AXON shared this news from Scottsdale, Arizona. These confidential negotiations involved a restructuring of the Notes.

news.headline: EnterOne acquires SLS LATAM Argentina and Chile, enhancing its presence in Latin America. Expands global leadership in IT training with Cisco Learning Partners.
news.summary: Reston, VA - On March 7, 2025, EnterOne, a Trainocate subsidiary and a prominent provider of IT training and services worldwide, revealed the purchase of SLS LATAM Argentina and SLS LATAM Chile, esteemed Cisco Learning Partners. This move significantly expands EnterOne's reach in the industry.

news.headline: The DI Wire changes name to AltsWire to cover wide range of alternative investments; effective March 7, 2025.
news.summary: The prominent news outlet covering non-traded alternative investments is adopting a new name to accurately represent its expansive coverage. On March 7, 2025, in Los Angeles, The DI Wire, renowned for its in-depth reporting on the non-traded alternative investment sector, revealed...

news.headline: American Academy of Dermatology installs 4 new officers and 4 board members post-2025 Annual Meeting.
news.summary: In Orlando, Florida on March 7, 2025, at the conclusion of the 2025 Annual Meeting of the American Academy of Dermatology, there will be a total of four new officers and four new board members installed. These individuals are all certified dermatologists and part of the organization.

news.headline: SU Group (Nasdaq: SUGP) secures top sports venue with critical access control gates in Hong Kong.
news.summary: On March 7, 2025, SU Group Holdings Limited (Nasdaq: SUGP), a Hong Kong-based company specializing in security-related engineering services, revealed its deployment of crucial access control gates to enhance security measures. These gates are designed to regulate access and ensure safety for a significant location. SU Group continues to establish itself as a leader in security solutions, contributing to the advancement of safety protocols with its innovative technologies.

news.headline: CBE cancels in-person parent visits due to CUPE 40 strike; 800 members on strike since Feb 24, support staff average earning $34,500.
news.summary: In Calgary, the Calgary Board of Education recently made the decision to cancel in-person parent-teacher meetings as a result of the ongoing strike by CUPE 40 custodial workers. This strike, which began on February 24, involves 800 members of CUPE 40 and is part of a larger strike by 6,600 education support workers throughout Alberta. These workers, including CUPE 40 members, have been facing financial struggles, with the average support staff member earning approximately $34,500 annually. Many of these workers have not seen a significant wage increase in the past decade. CUPE 40 President Clay Gordon expressed disappointment over the cancellation of the meetings, emphasizing the unfortunate impact on face-to-face interactions between parents and teachers.

news.headline: Highway Holdings Limited appoints Marcum Asia CPAs LLP as new auditor, replacing ARK, effective immediately.
news.summary: On March 7, 2025, in Hong Kong, Highway Holdings Limited (Nasdaq: HIHO) revealed the selection of Marcum Asia CPAs LLP, based in New York, as its fresh independent auditor. This change, effective immediately, replaces the prior auditor, Hong Kong's ARK.

news.headline: 7th Annual Best in the West Showdown in Big Sky Town Center featured top skijoring teams competing for $15,000 with record attendance.
news.summary: The 7th edition of the Best in the West Showdown took place from February 7 to 9, 2025, at the Big Sky Town Center in BIG SKY, Mont. This event saw the top skijoring teams from North America competing for a prize pool of $15,000.

news.headline: Crexi wins top honor in G2's 2025 Best Software Awards for Real Estate Software Products. #MarinaDelRey #PRNewswire
news.summary: A prominent commercial real estate data platform and marketplace, Crexi, based in Marina del Rey, California, recently earned a spot on G2's 2025 Best Software Awards list in the Best Real Estate Software Products category. This acknowledgment is significant as it is based on feedback from verified users. Crexi's inclusion in this list highlights its position as a top player in the industry.

news.headline: Nayax completes offering to Israeli classified investors, issuing Notes and Warrants; announced on March 7, 2025.
news.summary: In Herzliya, Israel, on March 07, 2025, Nayax Ltd. disclosed that it finalized a tender in Israel for classified investors, per the Israeli Securities Law, 1968. The tender involved the issuance of Notes and Warrants to these investors. The company, traded on Nasdaq as NYAX and on TASE as NYAX, had initially shared news of this on February 13, 2025.

news.headline: Lithium Carbonate futures trading launched by Abaxx Exchange, offering three regional contracts for trading.
news.summary: Abaxx Technologies Inc., a financial software and market infrastructure company, announced that its three regional, physically-deliverable Lithium Carbonate futures contracts are now available for trading. The company, listed as CBOE:ABXX and OTCQX:ABXXF, is the indirect majority shareholder of Abaxx Singapore Pte Ltd., which owns Abaxx Commodity Exchange and Clearinghouse. These contracts are part of the Abaxx Exchange and Abaxx Clearing, and the company also produces the SmarterMarkets™ Podcast. The announcement was made on March 7, 2025, in Toronto.
